steps.title: Use the tortoise finding
steps.content: The passage starts with social animals that care for their young, then adds a surprising result: solitary Testudo tortoise hatchlings, which receive no parental care, still preferred face-like images. That means face preference is not limited to social species with parental care.

steps.title: Rule out unsupported claims
steps.content: A contradicts the preference shown by tortoise hatchlings, since they did not treat the image as threatening. C wrongly turns an innate attraction into a learned one. D compares hatchlings with adults, but adult tortoises were not tested. The supported conclusion is that researchers should not automatically connect the trait to social interaction or parental care. The answer is B.
